questionHtml:
The electronegativity values of four elements are given.

What is the order of increasing polarity of the bonds in the following compounds?

A. CO < OF2 < NO < CF4

B. CF4 < CO < OF2 < NO

C. NO < OF2 < CO < CF4

D. CF4 < NO < OF2 < CO

meta.title: The electronegativity values of four elements are given. What is the order of increasing polarity of the bonds in the following compounds? A. CO < OF2 < NO < CF4 B. CF4 < CO < OF2
